game_name: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
description: Default PC keyboard and mouse bindings for MGSV:TPP.
game_context: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain — stealth action. You are Snake infiltrating enemy outposts. Core loop: move through the environment, scan for guards, take them out or sneak past, reach objectives. Shoot only when an enemy is clearly visible on screen. Sprint between cover. Combine movement with camera — do not stand still just aiming. Vary your actions every frame.

action_descriptions.MOVE_FORWARD: Walk forward toward objective or next cover — 1.5 seconds
action_descriptions.SPRINT_FORWARD: Sprint straight ahead at full speed — 1.5 seconds
action_descriptions.SPRINT_AND_LOOK_RIGHT: Sprint forward WHILE sweeping camera right — move + scan simultaneously
action_descriptions.SPRINT_AND_LOOK_LEFT: Sprint forward WHILE sweeping camera left — move + scan simultaneously
action_descriptions.MOVE_AND_LOOK_RIGHT: Walk forward WHILE panning camera right — stealthy advance with scan
action_descriptions.MOVE_AND_LOOK_LEFT: Walk forward WHILE panning camera left — stealthy advance with scan
action_descriptions.STRAFE_LEFT: Step left to reach cover or dodge
action_descriptions.STRAFE_RIGHT: Step right to reach cover or dodge
action_descriptions.LOOK_LEFT: Sweep camera left only — use when stationary to scan for guards
action_descriptions.LOOK_RIGHT: Sweep camera right only — use when stationary to scan for guards
action_descriptions.TAKE_COVER: Crouch/prone to hide from guards or reduce exposure
action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT: Snap-aim and fire at the enemy visible on screen RIGHT NOW
action_descriptions.STRAFE_SHOOT_RIGHT: Dodge right WHILE shooting — strafe away from enemy fire and return fire
action_descriptions.STRAFE_SHOOT_LEFT: Dodge left WHILE shooting — strafe away from enemy fire and return fire
action_descriptions.RELOAD: Reload weapon — only when ammo counter is low or empty
action_descriptions.QUICK_DIVE: Dive/roll to evade gunfire or fast slide
action_descriptions.CONTEXT_ACTION: Interact — open door, grab item, interrogate or grab guard
action_descriptions.IDLE: Do nothing — ONLY for loading screens, cutscenes, or pause menus
